Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/unnecessaryPipe.ts(14,29): suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
/.src/unnecessaryPipe.ts(16,35): suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)


==== /.src/unnecessaryPipe.ts (2 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import { pipe } from "effect/Function"
    
    export const shouldNotReport = pipe(
      Effect.succeed("Hello"),
      Effect.map((x) => x + " World")
    )
    
    export const shouldNotReport2 = Effect.succeed("Hello").pipe(
      Effect.map((x) => x + " World")
    )
    
    export const shouldReport = pipe(32)
                                ~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
    
    export const shouldReportNoArgs = Effect.succeed(32).pipe()
                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
